ECG Classification

Zach Quicksall

June 06/26/20, 2020

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(kableExtra)
library(moments)
library(gridExtra)
library(GGally)
library(themis)

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
base_dir = "."
data_dir = paste0(base_dir, "\\Data")
fig_dir = paste0(base_dir, "\\Figures")

Load Data

Training

# Load MIT training data
train_data = read_delim(paste0(data_dir, "\\mitbih_train.csv"), delim = ",", col_names = FALSE)

# Add sample ID and mark label
train_data = train_data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste0("TRAIN_", seq(1,nrow(train_data)))) %>%
  rename(class = X188) %>%
  mutate(class = as.factor(class)) %>%
  select(sample_id, class, everything())

kable(train_data[1:6, 1:10]) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
sample_id class X1 X2 X3 X4 X5 X6 X7 X8
TRAIN_1 0 0.9779412 0.9264706 0.6813725 0.2450980 0.1544118 0.1911765 0.1519608 0.0857843
TRAIN_2 0 0.9601139 0.8632479 0.4615385 0.1965812 0.0940171 0.1253561 0.0997151 0.0883191
TRAIN_3 0 1.0000000 0.6594595 0.1864865 0.0702703 0.0702703 0.0594595 0.0567568 0.0432432
TRAIN_4 0 0.9254144 0.6657459 0.5414365 0.2762431 0.1961326 0.0773481 0.0718232 0.0607735
TRAIN_5 0 0.9671361 1.0000000 0.8309859 0.5868545 0.3568075 0.2488263 0.1455399 0.0892019
TRAIN_6 0 0.9274611 1.0000000 0.6269430 0.1934370 0.0949914 0.0725389 0.0431779 0.0535406

Testing

# Load test data
test_data = read_delim(paste0(data_dir, "\\mitbih_test.csv"), delim = ",", col_names = FALSE)

# Add sample ID and mark label
test_data = test_data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste0("TEST_", seq(1, nrow(test_data))),) %>%
  rename(class = X188) %>%
  mutate(class = as.factor(class)) %>%
  select(sample_id, class, everything())

Visualization

Class Frequency

train_data %>%
  dplyr::count(class) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
class n prop
0 72471 0.8277292
1 2223 0.0253900
2 5788 0.0661078
3 641 0.0073212
4 6431 0.0734518

ECGs by Class

# Reformat data for visualization via ggplot
vis_df = train_data
colnames(vis_df) = c(c("sample_id", "class"), seq(1,187))
vis_df = vis_df %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  top_n(5, sample_id) %>%
  gather(key = "time", value = "voltage", -sample_id, -class) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  arrange(sample_id, time)

# Plot
vis_df %>%
ggplot(aes(x = time, y = voltage, color = class)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~sample_id) +
  theme_bw()

Modeling

Feature Engineering Approach

# Transform data into long format for feature computation
train_long = train_data
colnames(train_long) = c(c("sample_id", "class"), seq(1,187))

train_long = train_long %>%
  gather(key = "time", value = "voltage", -sample_id, -class) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  arrange(sample_id, time)

kable(head(train_long)) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
sample_id class time voltage
TRAIN_1 0 1 0.9779412
TRAIN_1 0 2 0.9264706
TRAIN_1 0 3 0.6813725
TRAIN_1 0 4 0.2450980
TRAIN_1 0 5 0.1544118
TRAIN_1 0 6 0.1911765 
train_feature_df = train_long %>%
  group_by(sample_id, class) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(voltage),
            median = median(voltage),
            stdev = sd(voltage),
            skew = skewness(voltage),
            kurt = kurtosis(voltage),
            n_above_mean = sum(voltage > mean),
            n_above_median = sum(voltage > median),
            n_above_zero = sum(voltage > 0),
            summed_voltage = sum(voltage))

write_delim(train_feature_df, paste0(data_dir, "\\cleaned\\train_feature_df.txt"), delim = "\t")
sample_id class mean median skew summed_voltage n_above_mean
TRAIN_1 0 0.0984193 0.0612745 3.5462007 18.40441 72
TRAIN_10 0 0.0932637 0.0000000 3.1748972 17.44031 65
TRAIN_100 0 0.3891320 0.4797980 0.0285321 72.76768 105
TRAIN_1000 0 0.0685992 0.0000000 4.4832951 12.82804 68
TRAIN_10000 0 0.1286848 0.1234375 2.9402132 24.06406 91
TRAIN_10001 0 0.2422362 0.3165137 0.5513905 45.29817 103 
a = train_feature_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mean, fill = class)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

b = train_feature_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = class, y = mean, fill = class)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw()

grid.arrange(a, b, nrow = 1, widths = c(8,6))

N = 300

tmp = train_feature_df %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  sample_n(N) %>%
  select(class, mean, median, stdev, skew, kurt, n_above_mean)

ggpairs(tmp,
        mapping = aes(color = class,
                      alpha = 0.4),
        columns = seq(2,ncol(tmp))) +
  theme_bw()

Testing Data

test_long = test_data
colnames(test_long) = c(c("sample_id", "class"), seq(1,187))

test_long = test_long %>%
  gather(key = "time", value = "voltage", -sample_id, -class) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  arrange(sample_id, time)

test_feature_df = test_long %>%
  group_by(sample_id, class) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(voltage),
            median = median(voltage),
            stdev = sd(voltage),
            skew = skewness(voltage),
            kurt = kurtosis(voltage),
            n_above_mean = sum(voltage > mean),
            n_above_median = sum(voltage > median),
            n_above_zero = sum(voltage > 0),
            summed_voltage = sum(voltage))

write_delim(test_feature_df, paste0(data_dir, "\\cleaned\\test_feature_df.txt"), delim = "\t")
sample_id class mean median skew summed_voltage n_above_mean
TEST_1 0 0.0804128 0.0537190 4.4313222 15.03719 65
TEST_10 0 0.2472819 0.3781676 0.3611374 46.24172 96
TEST_100 0 0.0405080 0.0000000 4.1646915 7.57500 25
TEST_1000 0 0.1642851 0.0983607 1.3466968 30.72131 85
TEST_10000 0 0.1353989 0.1615120 2.6276695 25.31959 108
TEST_10001 0 0.2505620 0.3248408 0.4267165 46.85510 124

Modeling

# Helper function for visualizing the confusion matrix
view_confusion_matrix = function(actual_values, predicted_values, title) {
  
  tmp = data.frame(Actual = actual_values, Predicted = predicted_values)
  actual = as.data.frame(table(tmp$Actual))
  names(actual) = c("Actual", "ActualFreq")
  confusion = as.data.frame(table(tmp$Actual, tmp$Predicted))
  names(confusion) = c("Actual", "Predicted", "Freq")
  confusion = merge(confusion, actual, by = c("Actual"))
  confusion$Percent = confusion$Freq / confusion$ActualFreq * 100
  
  confusion %>%
    ggplot() +
    geom_tile(aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Percent), data = confusion) +
    geom_text(aes(x=Actual,y=Predicted, label=sprintf("%.1f", Percent)), data=confusion, size=4, colour="black") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low="grey",high="orange") +
    geom_tile(aes(x=Actual,y=Predicted),data=subset(confusion, Actual == Predicted), color="black",size=0.3, fill="black", alpha=0) +
    labs(title = title)
}
# Define models

## Logistic regression
lr_mod = multinom_reg(penalty = 0.1) %>%
  set_engine("glmnet") %>%
  set_mode("classification")

## knn
knn_mod = parsnip::nearest_neighbor(neighbors = 9) %>%
  set_engine("kknn") %>%
  set_mode("classification")

## Random forest
rf_mod = rand_forest(trees = 1000, mtry = 4) %>%
  set_engine("ranger") %>%
  set_mode("classification")
Imbalanced
# Downsampling recipe
imbalanced_recipe = recipe(class ~ ., data = train_feature_df) %>%
  update_role(sample_id, new_role = "ID")

# Define workflows
lr_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(lr_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(imbalanced_recipe)

knn_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(knn_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(imbalanced_recipe)

rf_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(rf_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(imbalanced_recipe)
# Fit models
lr_fit = lr_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
  
knn_fit = knn_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)

rf_fit = rf_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
lr_pred = predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

knn_pred = predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

rf_pred = predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))
lr_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.8276083 

knn_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.9230769 

rf_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.9268683

Downsampling
# Downsampling recipe
downsampling_recipe = recipe(class ~ ., data = train_feature_df) %>%
  update_role(sample_id, new_role = "ID") %>%
  step_downsample(class)

# Define workflows
lr_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(lr_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(downsampling_recipe)

knn_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(knn_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(downsampling_recipe)

rf_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(rf_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(downsampling_recipe)
# Fit models
lr_fit = lr_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
  
knn_fit = knn_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)

rf_fit = rf_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
# Get predictions
lr_pred = predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

knn_pred = predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

rf_pred = predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))
lr_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.28129 

knn_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.6615659 

rf_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.6694226

Upsampling
# Upsampling recipe
upsampling_recipe = recipe(class ~ ., data = train_feature_df) %>%
  update_role(sample_id, new_role = "ID") %>%
  step_upsample(class)

# Define workflows
lr_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(lr_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(upsampling_recipe)

knn_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(knn_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(upsampling_recipe)

rf_workflow = workflow() %>%
  add_model(rf_mod) %>%
  add_recipe(upsampling_recipe)
# Fit models
lr_fit = lr_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
  
knn_fit = knn_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)

rf_fit = rf_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_feature_df)
# Get predictions and probabilities
lr_pred = predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(lr_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

knn_pred = predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(knn_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))

rf_pred = predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, test_feature_df, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(test_feature_df %>% select(class))
lr_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.0660058 

knn_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.8900512 

rf_pred %>%
  accuracy(truth = class, .pred_class) %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
.metric .estimator .estimate
accuracy multiclass 0.9260917
